title: ditassa gracilis
intro: Ditassa gracilis is a flowering plant native to Australia, commonly known as a species of the Apocynaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ditassa gracilis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Ditassa gracilis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
